name: Harvest-Time Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 2 each Tomatoes, cut into 8 wedges each
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the basic meatballs and set aside.
2. Melt the margarine in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the garlic, thyme leaves, mushrooms, and zucchini to the skillet. Cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the cooked meatballs; cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with salt and cheese.
6. Add the tomato wedges, cover, and heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
